character.name: Male barbarian, messy sandy-blonde hair,
character.prompt:
Male barbarian, messy sandy-blonde hair, scarred face, muscular bare
chest, fur pelt over one shoulder. Blood-stained dark leather pants and
heavy boots. Dual-wielding two broad axes wet with blood. Blood-red
scars (#8B1A1A) across chest and arms. Savage, feral energy. No purple,
no blue glow. Dark fantasy pixel art, Diablo 2 / Hades style, heavy
black outline, muted palette with blood-red accent, transparent background.
